title: belladonna blanda
intro: Belladonna blanda, also known as deadly nightshade, is a highly toxic plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. Despite its toxicity, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being an antispasmodic, anticholinergic, and analgesic. The plant's health benefits include relieving pain and inflammation, reducing fever, and providing relief from spasms and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of belladonna blanda include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, although its use should be strictly under the guidance of a medical professional due to its toxicity.
